title: Veryl registry entry
description: One registered Veryl repository. File path: registry/<owner>/<repo>.json

repo.description: Canonical host/owner/repo of the repository, e.g. github.com/alice/fifo

projects.description: Veryl project name(s) contained in the repository. The crawler is authoritative; this may be empty until the first successful crawl.

status.description: pending: unverified or awaiting push; active: verified; yanked: removed by owner; disputed: under moderation

registered_at.description: When the entry was first created

registered_by.description: Best-effort hint of the submitter (e.g. github:alice). Not trusted without OAuth.

last_verified.description: Last time verify-by-clone succeeded; null until first successful verification
